property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testZeroIdBoundary
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Mar 05, 2026 2:29:20 PM com.api.automation.utils.ConfigReader <clinit> INFO: Successfully loaded configuration from config.properties

testcase.name: testIntentionalFailureWrongTitle

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. JSON path title doesn't match. Expected: This title does not exist Actual: quidem molestiae enim

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path title doesn't match. Expected: This title does not exist Actual: quidem molestiae enim

testcase.name: testIntentionalFailureWrongStatusCode

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <500> but was <200>.

testcase.failure:
